text:

The moment Diana realised academic writing wasn’t enough

title: Science Café
About
Workshops & Training
Science Writing for Beginners
Science Writing for Beginners
text:
What we’ll cover

How to find the human story inside a research paper
Structure: the inverted pyramid vs. narrative approaches
Writing the first sentence (the hardest part)
Plain language techniques that don’t dumb things down
How to pitch your story to a publication or blog

No writing experience necessary. Bring a piece of your own research or a paper you find interesting — we’ll workshop it together.






What to bring



A research paper or topic you’d like to write about, and a laptop or notebook. Tea and coffee provided.


Facilitator: Maya Patel, Co-founder & Editor
